prompt: Six freshly cut pine panels for a small birdhouse are laid out on a workbench: two side walls with angled roofs, a back panel, a front panel with a marked entry hole, and two roof pieces slightly oversized for an overhang. A tape measure and handsaw rest nearby, with pencil layout lines still visible on the pale wood grain. The scene is a bright, tidy solarpunk workshop with soft natural light and organized tools on the wall, photorealistic at 512x512 with no logos or text.
